personal.name: KHaled Tofailieh
personal.title: Senior AI & Backend Engineer
personal.bio: I am a Senior AI & Backend Engineer dedicated to building intelligent, production-ready systems. By combining Clean Architecture & DDD with state-of-the-art AI orchestration—such as stateful multi-agent systems and hybrid retrieval (RAG) pipelines—I turn complex ideas into robust, scalable software services.
personal.closingBio: Ready to build the future of intelligent systems? I am always excited to collaborate on cutting-edge AI architectures, scale high-performance backends, or exchange ideas on the latest engineering patterns. Let's connect and build something extraordinary.
story: I work at the intersection of **AI Engineering** and **Backend Architecture**, creating systems that are both *smart* and *scalable*. My background started with data engineering and machine learning models, which naturally led me to building **production-grade AI systems**. Over the years, I have designed and deployed complete platforms from scratch—like **Subul's Talent Engine**—taking them from initial ideas to actual production serving thousands of active users.

For me, AI is not just about using APIs. It is about building **smart, autonomous workflows** and search systems that solve real-world problems. Whether creating **hybrid semantic search engines** with *Qdrant* and *Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF)*, or orchestrating **multi-agent systems** with *LangGraph*, I focus on writing **clean code** and using **Domain-Driven Design (DDD)**. I enjoy finding and fixing technical bottlenecks to make sure systems are reliable and fast.

Continuous learning and sharing knowledge are very important to me. When I am not working on my **MSc in Artificial Intelligence** or writing articles on *Medium*, I teach and **mentor other developers** in programs like the **'AI Innovator Pathway'**. I love experimenting with new technologies and pushing the boundaries of what intelligent software can do.

principles.title: Clean Architecture
principles.description: Building scalable, maintainable backends using Clean Architecture and Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles.

principles.title: Research & Experiment
principles.description: Constantly benchmarking new models, analyzing emerging AI frameworks, and avoiding production pitfalls.

principles.title: Mentorship & Sharing
principles.description: Empowering the developer community by lecturing, teaching, and writing in-depth technical blogs on Medium.

principles.title: High Performance
principles.description: Optimizing semantic search queries, vector database storage, and API latency for high-throughput enterprise workloads.

experience.title: AI & Backend Engineer
experience.description: Founding engineer of Subul's Talent Engine Platform. Led the end-to-end development from initial planning and CEO alignment to architecting, deploying, and scaling advanced AI and backend services that drive the platform's core capabilities.
achievements: Led the full-cycle development of the Talent Engine, engaging directly with C-suite and operations to define, architect, and deploy business-critical features, transitioning operations from Airtable to a dedicated platform
Architected a high-performance hybrid semantic search engine using Qdrant, optimizing talent discovery through multi-vector embeddings, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), and multi-stage LLM reranking
Engineered scalable AI backend services utilizing FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, and MongoDB, deeply rooted in Domain-Driven Design (DDD) principles
Automated talent profile processing, reducing operational overhead from 2-3 hours per candidate to under 1 minute via advanced AI-driven standardization and assessment
Developed and rigorously evaluated complex AI prompts and multi-agent workflows using LangSmith, ensuring high-quality, reliable outputs for CV optimization and analysis
Propelled platform adoption by delivering seamless integrations and user experiences, scaling the active talent pool from 1K to over 10K within the first year
Launched a suite of AI products including an agentic CV editor, intelligent profile matching, one-click tailored job applications, and career coaching simulations
Led and instructed the 'AI Innovator Pathway' training program, equipping candidates with hands-on experience in advanced AI architectures

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Led the development and deployment of advanced NLP and similarity search models to optimize medical claim coding accuracy, alongside architecting robust Robotic Process Automation (RPA) systems.
achievements: Researched, experimented, and deployed state-of-the-art similarity search and NLP models (Transformers, PyTorch) to significantly enhance medical claim coding
Developed and maintained sophisticated RPA pipelines using Selenium to automate complex information retrieval processes across insurance provider portals
Designed and launched 8 new custom RPA workflows to expand automated data extraction capabilities, ensuring high reliability via Flask APIs
Leveraged HuggingFace models and deep learning architectures to build scalable, high-performance machine learning solutions for enterprise-level automation

experience.title: Data Engineer
experience.description: Engineered and optimized robust data pipelines and complex ETL workflows, ensuring the integrity, security, and high performance of enterprise-scale data infrastructure.
achievements: Architected and optimized seamless data transfer pipelines, continuously enhancing import/export processes to support high-volume data integration
Executed advanced data manipulation and transformation techniques on sensitive company and client datasets while maintaining strict data confidentiality
Conducted comprehensive query optimization within PostgreSQL environments, proactively identifying bottlenecks to maximize system performance
Developed automated scripts for rigorous data cleaning and bug tracking, significantly improving overall data reliability
Designed and delivered comprehensive, data-driven reports, translating complex datasets into actionable insights for stakeholders

education.degree: Master of Science (MSc) in Artificial Intelligence
Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Artificial Intelligence

projects.title: Talent Engine: Autonomous Profiling & Career Ecosystem
projects.subtitle: Advanced AI Profiling, Matching & Application System
projects.description: An advanced AI platform utilizing Multi-Agent Systems to autonomously analyze, optimize, and assess candidate profiles, seamlessly integrated with a 1-click tailored application and career coaching ecosystem. Reduced manual HR processing time from 3 hours to 1 minute.
projects.longDescription: Architected the core intelligence layer for the Subul Talent Engine, an end-to-end platform serving 10K+ users. Built an 'Agentic CV Editor' and profile assessment engine using LangChain and LangGraph to autonomously refine resumes and analyze profiles against specific job descriptions. Developed complex LLM evaluation pipelines using LangSmith to guarantee high-fidelity outputs. This system fundamentally transformed operational efficiency, automating CV standardization and deep matching analysis without manual intervention, outperforming global competitors in accuracy and speed. Additionally, led the development of user-facing career advancement tools including a generative AI-powered 'One-Click Apply' pipeline that dynamically tailors CVs and crafts personalized cover letters. Integrated conversational AI systems for career coaching and HR interview simulation, drastically improving candidate preparedness. Built with scalable FastAPI backends, these features drove massive engagement, contributing to a 10x growth in the talent pool within one year.

projects.title: Talent Engine: Enterprise Operations & Admin Hub
projects.subtitle: Centralized Admin Hub & Campaign Management
projects.description: A comprehensive administrative hub and campaign management system that centralized HR operations, integrating Airtable workflows and automating candidate engagement.
projects.longDescription: Transitioned heavy, manual operational processes into a unified, high-performance administrative platform. Engineered a secure HR portal providing automated CV anonymization, candidate application tracking, and dynamic position management. Designed a robust email notification and campaign engine to keep the talent pool actively engaged with new opportunities. Integrated complex synchronization with Airtable to ensure seamless operational continuity during the platform migration. This backend infrastructure was built on FastAPI and MongoDB, strictly adhering to Domain-Driven Design (DDD) for enterprise scalability.

projects.title: Semantic Hybrid Search & Retrieval System
projects.subtitle: Advanced Multi-Vector Talent Search Engine
projects.description: A high-performance hybrid semantic search engine using Qdrant, optimizing talent discovery through multi-vector embeddings, Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), and LLM reranking.
projects.longDescription: Architected and deployed an advanced hybrid, multi-vector semantic search engine designed to seamlessly match complex job descriptions with top-tier talent. Engineered a sophisticated multi-stage ingestion and retrieval pipeline that dynamically analyzes and optimizes search queries. Leveraged Qdrant for highly scalable vector storage and batch query execution, combining Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) with state-of-the-art rerankers (JinaRank and LLM-based reranking) to guarantee maximum precision. Implemented aggressive multi-level caching strategies and a persistent search history mechanism, drastically reducing latency and enhancing the recruiter experience.

projects.title: ICD Code Prediction System
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered Medical Claim Coding
projects.description: An AI application leveraging NER and Transformer LLMs to parse clinical notes and predict ICD codes, drastically reducing claim processing time from manual expert review taking minutes/hours to a few seconds.
projects.longDescription: Developed and deployed an end-to-end AI application for medical claim processing during employment at Accumed. By extracting clinical entities using Medical Named Entity Recognition (NER) and Fine-tuned Transformer Models (LLMs), the system automates medical diagnostic code assignment. This eliminated manual coding bottlenecks previously handled by specialized experts, streamlining encoding latency down to seconds while maintaining high precision.

projects.title: RPA & Insurance Lookup Engine
projects.subtitle: High-Throughput Scraping, Streaming & Bot Optimization
projects.description: Enterprise RPA and lookup engine for automated patient and insurance verification. Enhanced fetch speed from 2 minutes to 30 seconds via dynamic waiting, built a custom RPA framework adding 8 new bots, and integrated Kafka & Grafana monitoring.
projects.longDescription: Architected, maintained, and optimized an enterprise-grade Robotic Process Automation (RPA) and real-time lookup service at Accumed for scraping patient eligibility and insurance claim information across healthcare provider portals. Replaced fixed delays with dynamic wait algorithms to boost system availability and slash data retrieval latency by 75% (from 2 minutes to 30 seconds). Developed a custom modular Python RPA package that standardized bot creation, accelerating development cycles and enabling the rapid deployment of 8 new production RPA workflows. Integrated Apache Kafka for event-driven streaming and Grafana for live telemetry and fleet monitoring.

projects.title: AI Innovator Pathway
projects.subtitle: Intensive 3-Month Enterprise Training & Courseware
projects.description: An intensive, production-focused 3-month AI curriculum designed for software engineers and AI graduates to gain hands-on, production-grade AI expertise.
projects.longDescription: Designed and instructed a comprehensive 3-month enterprise AI curriculum aimed at equipping software engineers and fresh AI graduates with production-level engineering capabilities. Synthesized top industry frameworks, research papers, and hands-on experience to author custom presentation decks, interactive Jupyter/Colab notebooks, and real-world project labs. Mastered topics included Advanced RAG pipelines (hybrid search, reciprocal rank fusion), stateful multi-agent orchestration via LangChain & LangGraph, and systematic LLM evaluation methodologies.

publications.title: Using Medical Named Entity Recognition in Automatic ICD Prediction
publications.description: Research on utilizing Medical Named Entity Recognition (NER) for automated prediction of International Classification of Diseases (ICD) codes.

publications.title: “The Multi-Vector Trap in RAG”: Why Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) Fails and How to Fix It
publications.description: An in-depth analysis of the limitations of Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) in multi-vector Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, offering concrete strategies and architectures to fix the multi-vector trap.

publications.title: “Hierarchies vs. Swarms”: The Architecture of Production Multi-Agent Systems
publications.description: An analysis of multi-agent architectures, contrasting Hierarchical (Sub-Agent) delegation with Swarm (Handoff) patterns using LangGraph's Command primitive and active_agent routing to resolve the supervisor bottleneck.
